items.summary: Add translations for Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Turkish, Russian, Vietnamese, Korean, and Dutch to frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts alongside the existing English strings, covering all existing translation keys (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.).

Update frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext.tsx to support all ten locales (en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl), ensuring the translation function `t` resolves strings from the correct locale based on the user's language setting and falls back to English for missing keys.

Update the language selector in frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx to list all ten supported languages — English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Turkish, Russian, Vietnamese, Korean, and Dutch — and persist the selected language via the existing useAccountSettings language mutation so it is reflected app-wide.

Update the backend language setting in backend/main.mo to accept and store all ten locale codes (en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl) in UserSettings, replacing or extending any previous single-language field.
